runtime_smoke_test.crud-validator.sh: prints usage and exits 2 on no args
runtime_smoke_test.auth-test.sh: prints usage and exits 2 on no args

skill_md_edits: Added 'Fast path' paragraph under '## Step 2: CRUD Validation Pattern' pointing at scripts/crud-validator.sh (line 67)
Added 'Fast path' paragraph under '## Step 3: Authentication Testing' pointing at scripts/auth-test.sh (line 134)
Inline curl examples preserved as pedagogical source of truth
notes: Both scripts use set -euo pipefail, capture both response body and HTTP status to evidence dir, and exit non-zero on unexpected status codes. auth-test.sh originally used bash 4+ ${v,,} lowercase expansion which broke on macOS bash 3.2.57 (runtime check caught it); replaced with an explicit -z guard chain for portability. Scripts follow the style of scripts/benchmark/score-project.sh (echo diagnostics, mkdir -p evidence dir, strict mode).
